description_long: This is a pair of high-top athletic sneakers featuring a bold black and white color scheme with glossy and matte finishes. The shoes have a prominent black Nike Swoosh on the side panels and a white Air Jordan Wings logo near the ankle collar. The upper is constructed from a combination of synthetic leather and textile materials, with perforations on the heel for breathability. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with black laces, and the tongue and collar are padded for comfort. The midsole and outsole are robust, designed for support and traction, with subtle texturing visible on the sole. The overall design is modern and sporty, suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A pair of high-top black and white athletic sneakers with Nike Swoosh and Air Jordan Wings logos, featuring a mix of glossy and matte finishes and a standard criss-cross lacing system.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical toe boxes, black laces, and padded tongues, with the Nike Swoosh partially visible on the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full Nike Swoosh, perforated heel, and the Air Jordan Wings logo near the ankle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded collars, perforated heel sections, and the back of the Air Jordan Wings logo.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the Nike Swoosh, perforated heel, and Air Jordan Wings logo clearly visible.
attribute_logo: White Air Jordan Wings logo on the ankle collar, black Nike Swoosh on the side panels
